description: This extension is designed for unmarshaling logs/traces/metrics encoded in specific format produced by [Azure Diagnostic Settings Export](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/diagnostic-settings) or [Azure Data Collection Rules (DCRs)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/data-collection/data-collection-rule-overview)
name: azureencodingextension
